headline: Skyworks Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ:SWKS) Offers a High-Yield Dividend with a Strong Balance Sheet
summary: Skyworks Solutions offers a high 4.76% dividend yield with a history of growth, backed by a strong balance sheet and cash flow, despite a high payout ratio.
